functions.label: Submit Iris Match Result
functions.description: Submit the result of an iris biometric match from the Chainlink oracle. Only the authorized oracle can call this.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.label: Wallet Address
parameters.description: The wallet whose iris was scanned

parameters.name: confidence
parameters.label: Confidence Score
parameters.description: Confidence score of the iris match (0-100)

parameters.name: nonce
parameters.label: Nonce
parameters.description: Unique nonce to prevent replay attacks

functions.label: Approve Transaction with Iris
functions.description: Approve a blockchain transaction using your iris scan. Requires a valid iris match.

parameters.name: txHash
parameters.label: Transaction Hash
parameters.description: The hash of the transaction to approve
